raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J12345",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 3,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 4,
    "RX.5": 2
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies some prior work (Toolformer, Visual ChatGPT) but does not articulate the delta clearly. The 'first' claim is heavily hedged and may not be supported.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (the 13B backbone) but does not audit every load-bearing citation.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., the 'dominant approach' forecast) but presents other output as equally confident.",
    "RX.3": "The agent mostly stays within scope, with only minor drifts (e.g., discussing prior work).",
    "RX.4": "The agent introduces no new errors or harmful content, but may have minor regressions (e.g., the 'any black-box API' generalization).",
    "RX.5": "The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason; some changes are not clearly justified."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.6,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.4
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent identifies some prior work (Toolformer, Visual ChatGPT) but does not articulate the delta clearly. The 'first' claim is heavily hedged and may not be supported.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flags one missing citation (the 13B backbone) but does not audit every load-bearing citation.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for some claims (e.g., the 'dominant approach' forecast) but presents other output as equally confident.
rationale.RX.3: The agent mostly stays within scope, with only minor drifts (e.g., discussing prior work).
rationale.RX.4: The agent introduces no new errors or harmful content, but may have minor regressions (e.g., the 'any black-box API' generalization).
rationale.RX.5: The agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason; some changes are not clearly justified.
